title: Golden Meadow Happy Horse Portrait
description: A joyful cinematic portrait of a happy horse running through a golden meadow at sunset.
prompt: A joyful photorealistic portrait of a happy horse galloping through a golden meadow at sunset, with a glossy coat, bright eyes, flowing mane, warm golden-hour light, soft dust, dynamic motion, and a cinematic countryside feeling.

title: Cute Happy Horse Sticker Sheet
description: A cute sticker sheet showing a cheerful little horse in playful poses.
prompt: Create a cute sticker sheet featuring a happy little horse in 12 expressive poses on a clean white background with pastel colors, fluffy mane, rosy cheeks, bright eyes, and cheerful captions like Yay, Good Job, and Lets Go.

title: Happy Horse Storybook Scene
description: A warm storybook illustration of a child hugging a happy horse in a flower field.
prompt: An enchanting storybook illustration of a smiling child hugging a happy horse in a flower field, with painterly textures, pastel colors, butterflies, drifting petals, soft sunlight, and a wholesome magical mood.

title: Happy Horse Four Panel Manga
description: A cozy four-panel manga about a horse helping friends on a sunny farm.
prompt: Create a clean four-panel manga page about a happy horse helping friends on a sunny farm. Show a dropped basket of apples, playful teamwork, smiling animals, and a joyful picnic ending with soft pastel colors and a wholesome slice-of-life tone.
